indexes.expression: CREATE INDEX idx_sale_channel ON public.sale USING btree (channel) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_sale_channel_order_sku_unique ON public.sale USING btree (channel, channel_order_id, channel_sku) WHERE ((channel_order_id IS NOT NULL) AND (channel_sku IS NOT NULL) AND (deleted_at IS NULL))
CREATE INDEX idx_sale_master_card_id ON public.sale USING btree (master_card_id) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_sale_sold_at ON public.sale USING btree (sold_at) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_sale_status ON public.sale USING btree (status) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_sale_user_id ON public.sale USING btree (user_id) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_supplier_user_id ON public.supplier USING btree (user_id) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_supplier_order_status ON public.supplier_order USING btree (status) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_supplier_order_user_id ON public.supplier_order USING btree (user_id) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_supplier_order_item_master_card_id ON public.supplier_order_item USING btree (master_card_id) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_supplier_order_item_order_id ON public.supplier_order_item USING btree (order_id) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
